title: Hog and Pig in Overworld (Hoglin and Piglin in Overworld)
description: Allows Pighoglins and Hoglins to spawn and survive in the Overworld without zombification
body:
Allows Pighoglins and Hoglins to spawn and survive in the Overworld without zombification

 

"This mod brings the fierce inhabitants of the Nether to the Overworld! PigHoglin Overworld allows both Piglins and Hoglins to naturally spawn in the Overworld biomes. By utilizing a custom-built zombification immunity system, these mobs will no longer transform into Zombified Piglins or Zoglins upon entering the Overworld, preserving their original forms and behaviors.

Key Features:

Natural Spawning: Piglins and Hoglins now have a chance to spawn during the night in the Overworld.

Balanced Rarity: Configured with low spawn weights to ensure they remain rare and mysterious encounters that don't overwhelm the environment.

Immunity System: Implements a robust permanent immunity to zombification for all naturally spawned Piglins and Hoglins through specialized Java events and data tags.

No More Shaking: Fixes the 'shaking' animation usually seen when these mobs are outside the Nether, making them feel like true residents of the Overworld."
